title: bromus neglectus
intro: Bromus neglectus, also known as Rusty Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus neglectus include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dyspepsia, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Bromus neglectus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
